reasons: Johnson can deliver Odette into the middle of a fight, giving her a direct area-damage follow-up window.
Odette can convert Johnson's crash disruption into teamfight damage when enemies are caught near the impact point.

proof.summary: Johnson starts the surprise engage, while Odette follows with area damage during the enemy disruption window.
worksBestWhen: Odette casts after the crash connects.

reasons: Johnson can deliver Kadita into a sudden burst angle after the crash.
Kadita can immediately punish enemies in the crash area with fast magic burst.

proof.summary: Johnson creates the delivery and disruption, while Kadita adds fast burst in the crash area.
worksBestWhen: Johnson targets backline or grouped squishy heroes.
failureCases: Johnson crashes into only a tank.
Enemies save escape tools for the landing.

reasons: Johnson's crash gives Aurora a clean window to freeze or burst enemies after impact.
Aurora can layer control after the crash so the target has less time to escape.

proof.summary: Johnson creates the first disruption, while Aurora layers freeze and burst onto the crash target.
worksBestWhen: Aurora rides with Johnson or waits near the crash path.
failureCases: Aurora is too far to follow.
Johnson misses or crashes into the wrong target.

reasons: Johnson's crash can hold enemies in place long enough for Julian to layer enhanced-skill crowd control or burst.
Julian can follow the crash with Chain or Enhanced Chain to extend the control window.

proof.summary: Johnson creates the delivery and initial disruption, while Julian follows with enhanced-skill crowd control or burst.
worksBestWhen: Julian prepares the correct enhanced skill before riding or following.
Johnson crashes into targets that cannot immediately dash away.
failureCases: Julian enters with the wrong enhanced-skill order.
Enemies leave the Enhanced Chain area before the airborne trigger.

reasons: Johnson can deliver Eudora into range for a simple single-target burst follow-up.
Eudora can add stun and burst immediately after Johnson crashes into a priority target.

proof.summary: Johnson delivers Eudora into range, and Eudora adds stun and burst to secure the picked target.
worksBestWhen: Johnson crashes into a squishy hero.
failureCases: The enemy has magic defense or cleanse timing.
